items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the 24h Reminder notification.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific SMS reminder message for a dental cleaning appointment. However, the evidence does not provide concrete API reads or mechanisms that confirm the implementation of this notification. While the linked use case describes the expected message, it lacks details on how this message is triggered or sent, leading to an inconclusive status.
